content.summary: GLSL Copy POP that applies per-copy transforms to duplicate geometry. Each copy is offset along the X axis by a spacing factor multiplied by the copy index. Preserves point group membership across copies.
warnings: TDCopyIndex() only works inside a GLSL Copy POP, not a regular GLSL POP
Call TDUpdatePointGroups() to maintain group membership after modifying positions

uniforms.description: Spacing between copies along X axis
uniforms.name: uSpacing
